units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the foundational introduction to Apex, essential for hands-on learning as requested.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Understanding sObjects is crucial for hands-on Apex development, as it covers how to interact with Salesforce records programmatically.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: This unit focuses on hands-on data manipulation using DML statements, directly addressing the 'hands-on Apex' intent.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: Learning to write SOQL queries is a core hands-on Apex skill for retrieving data, building upon previous foundational knowledge.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: This unit provides hands-on practice with SOSL queries, offering another essential Apex data retrieval technique after SOQL.
